title: Directive-aware notifications with context
description: Notifier has zero directive awareness — only knows session IDs. CEO gets 'session done' with no context on what finished. Fix: wire DirectiveWatcher events into Notifier. Notifications should include directive name, initiative count, completion status, and whether 'Needs CEO Eyes' items exist. Merges former items: rich-directive-notifications + directive-aware-notification-context.
source_detail: Merged from two overlapping P1 items

title: Eliminate heavyweight directive double-spawn
description: Heavyweight directives require two background agent spawns — planning then execution. Each spawn takes 15-30s. Option A: Alex pauses at approval gate by watching a file write. Option B: Alex returns summary, CEO approves, sends message to still-running agent.

title: Group projects page by repository
description: The projects page renders all goals in a flat list. When multiple repos are registered (agent-conductor, sw, etc.), goals from different repos are mixed together. Group goals under repo headers so the CEO can see each repo's health at a glance.
trigger: After sw-consumer-migration is complete (so there's multi-repo data to group)
